note: Babel suspended redemptions and withdrawals after citing unusual liquidity pressures.
The withdrawal pause followed broader crypto-credit market stress.
Reported proprietary trading losses exceeded 280 million dollars.
Babel filed Singapore moratorium applications to support restructuring.
Restructuring discussion included Hope and Babel Recovery Coin economics.
Creditor protection was extended as in-court restructuring began.
NUS legal commentary described Babel's crypto restructuring plan and moratoria.
